name: iris-eval
description: MCP-native agent evaluation and observability server

tools.description: Evaluate agent output quality using configurable rules

resources.description: Dashboard summary with key metrics and trends
Full trace detail with spans and evaluation results

IRIS_LOG_LEVEL.description: Log level: debug, info, warn, error

IRIS_API_KEY.description: API key for HTTP authentication (optional, recommended for production)

IRIS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins
